title: From The Flingue - Season 2
description:
Every shadow hides a nightmare. Every sound may be your last.
This isn't Minecraft as you knew it
body:
🎁 **Modpack Details — Enter if you dare**

⚠️ From The Flingue : SEASON 2 is a complete survival horror overhaul that transforms the world into a place where fear is always present.
Built as an expansion inspired by the work of the team at [@Ninjaxx](https://www.youtube.com/@Ninjaxx), this pack adds dozens of new horror creatures, psychological mechanics, atmosphere improvements, and performance mods to create a world where you are never safe.

This is not just a horror modpack.
This is a complete survival horror overhaul, designed for both Singleplayer and Multiplayer.

You will hear things in the dark.
You will see things that shouldn't exist.
And sometimes… the game will watch you back.

👁 **Horror Mods Included — What is inside?**

This modpack includes multiple horror entities, stalkers, and sanity mechanics that make the game unpredictable.

**Creatures & Entities**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Deadrocks Enderman — A corrupted Enderman variant with disturbing behavior and unexpected appearances.
- The One Who Watches — A mysterious entity that observes the player from afar… until it doesn't.
- The Man From The Fog — One of the most iconic horror mods, adding a creature that stalks you in the mist and darkness.
- The Knocker — You may hear sounds behind you… but nothing is there. Or is it?
- The Hollow Stalker — A silent hunter that appears when you least expect it.
- The God — A powerful and terrifying presence that should never be summoned.
- Apollyon — A powerful demonic entity that brings intense horror encounters and dangerous events to your world.
- Faceless Villager — Villagers are no longer safe… some of them have no face, and they should not exist.
- The Box Of Horror — Adds 40+ horror mobs, each with unique sounds, behavior, and jumpscare mechanics.
- Face Of Horror — Disturbing visual encounters designed to make exploration unsafe.
- From The Fog — The core inspiration of the pack, adding Herobrine-like paranormal events.
Psychological & Atmosphere Mods
- Sanity — Your mind is not safe. Staying in darkness, being alone, or seeing horrors will affect your sanity and cause hallucinations, sounds, and paranoia.

</details>



These mods work together to create a world where:

The night is dangerous
Caves are terrifying
And silence is never a good sign
⚙ More Than Horror

**This modpack also includes:**

- ✅ Optimization mods for better performance
- ✅ Utility mods for smoother gameplay
- ✅ Visual & aesthetic mods for darker atmosphere
- ✅ Multiplayer compatibility
- ✅ Tested mod compatibility

Everything is configured to keep the game scary but playable.

**✨ Credits**

Huge thanks to the creators who allowed their mods to be used:

- Thanks to [@ZZiggs](https://www.curseforge.com/members/zziggs/projects) for allowing the use of Faceless Villager
- Thanks to [@GamerCraftZ](https://www.curseforge.com/members/gamercraftz/projects) for allowing the use of Apollyon
- Thanks to [@RypingOff](https://modrinth.com/user/RypingOff) for the logo and upcoming visuals
- Thanks to [@RushTixo](https://www.youtube.com/@rushtixo/videos) for testing the modpack before release
- Thanks to all horror mod creators who made this pack possible

This pack exists because of the creativity of the Minecraft modding community.

💡 **Mod Suggestions & Future Updates**

📌 **In our Discord server**

Season 2 evolves with the community.

Want to suggest a mod?

Please include :

- Mod Name
- Version
- CurseForge / Modrinth link
- Why it fits the pack (optional)

All relevant suggestions may be added in future updates.

The horror is not finished yet.
